title: pinus nigra subsp. salzmannii
intro: Pinus nigra subsp. salzmannii, also known as the Spanish black pine or Salzmann's pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. This tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of terpenes and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Pinus nigra subsp. salzmannii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the resin and needles of the Spanish black pine are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
